title: Actual code patch: 170 KB unified diff + changed files
public_claim: Actual code patch: 170 KB unified diff + changed files is a preserved project packet for unlike its many doc-only siblings in the 2026-04-15 cluster, this package is the actual patch implementation of Tranche Alpha (= "Phase II" / "Analytical Core Expansion") that the other handoffs only specify.
distinctive_mechanism: It converts an archive or handoff into three inspectable decisions: what the work product is for, which component pieces carry the work, and what action would turn it into a live room, paper, method, or software instrument.
use_value: It preserves the distinctive design logic for Actual code patch: 170 KB unified diff + changed files, so the portfolio can show the actual mechanism and status instead of reducing the project to a file-count or handoff label.
